lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਕਹਾ ਕਿਆ ਜਾਣਾ ਅਭਿਮਾਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: vin naavai nirbhau kahaa kiaa jaanaa abhimaan |
lines.english: Without the Name, how can one be fearless? How can he understand egotistical pride?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਨ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਹੈ ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਧਰਮੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: naa tis giaan na dhiaan hai naa tis dharam dhiaan |
lines.english: He has neither spiritual wisdom or meditation; neither Dharmic faith mor meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਸਾਜਨ ਸੇ ਰੰਗੁਲੇ ਕਿਸੁ ਪਹਿ ਕਰੀ ਪੁਕਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: naa saajan se rangule kis peh karee pukaar |
lines.english: I have no loving companions, whom I can ask for help.

lines.gurmukhi: ਥਾਕਿ ਰਹੀ ਕਿਵ ਅਪੜਾ ਹਾਥ ਨਹੀ ਨਾ ਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: thaak rahee kiv aparraa haath nahee naa paar |
lines.english: I am so tired - how can I get there? This ocean has no bottom or end.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਿ ਵਿਛੋੜੀ ਸੋ ਮੇਲਸੀ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਅਪਾਰਿ ॥੩੭॥
lines.translit: jin vichhorree so melasee gur kai het apaar |37|
lines.english: He who separated me, unites me again; my love for the Guru is infinite. ||37||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਪ੍ਰਿਉ ਜੇ ਕਰੀ ਮੇਲੇ ਮੇਲਣਹਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naanak priau priau je karee mele melanahaar |
lines.english: O Nanak, crying out, "Beloved, Beloved", we are united with the Uniter.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਰਹਰਿ ਪਾਪੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ਆਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: parahar paap pachhaanai aap |
lines.english: Sin is far away from one who understands himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪਿ ਲਦੇ ਪਾਪੇ ਪਾਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: paap lade paape paasaaraa |
lines.english: He loads himself with sin, and expands his world through sin.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਾਪੁ ਬੁਰਾ ਪਾਪੀ ਕਉ ਪਿਆਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: paap buraa paapee kau piaaraa |
lines.english: Sin is bad, but it is dear to the sinner.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਉ ਆਵਣ ਜਾਣਾ ਵੀਸਰੈ ਝੂਠੁ ਬੁਰਾ ਖੈ ਕਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: kiau aavan jaanaa veesarai jhootth buraa khai kaal |
lines.english: How can coming and going be forgotten? Falsehood is bad, and death is cruel.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਰਕਿ ਪੜੰਤਉ ਕਿਉ ਰਹੈ ਕਿਉ ਬੰਚੈ ਜਮਕਾਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: narak parrantau kiau rahai kiau banchai jamakaal |
lines.english: How can one avoid falling into hell? How can he cheat the Messenger of Death?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾ ਤਿਸੁ ਸੋਗੁ ਵਿਜੋਗੁ ਸੰਤਾਪੁ ॥
lines.translit: naa tis sog vijog santaap |
lines.english: He is not afflicted by sorrow or separation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਕਿਉ ਛੂਟੀਐ ਪਾਪੇ ਪਚਹਿ ਪਚਾਹਿ ॥੩੮॥
lines.translit: vin naavai kiau chhootteeai paape pacheh pachaeh |38|
lines.english: Without the Name, how can anyone be saved? They rot away in sin. ||38||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਜੰਜਾਲੀ ਵੇੜਿਆ ਭੀ ਜੰਜਾਲਾ ਮਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: man janjaalee verriaa bhee janjaalaa maeh |
lines.english: The mind is enveloped by entanglements, and into entanglements it falls.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਪਛੁਤਾਨਾ ਅਬ ਕਿਆ ਹੂਆ ॥
lines.translit: fir pachhutaanaa ab kiaa hooaa |
lines.english: Then he regrets it, but what can he do now?

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਾਹੀ ਫਾਸੈ ਕਊਆ ॥
lines.translit: fir fir faahee faasai kaooaa |
lines.english: Again and again, the crow falls into the trap.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਾਥਾ ਚੋਗ ਚੁਗੈ ਨਹੀ ਬੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: faathaa chog chugai nahee boojhai |
lines.english: Even though he is trapped, he pecks at the food; he does not understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਤ ਆਖੀ ਸੂਝੈ ॥
lines.translit: satagur milai ta aakhee soojhai |
lines.english: If he meets the True Guru, then he sees with his eyes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਆਵੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਿਰਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: fir fir aavai fir fir jaae |
lines.english: Over and over again, he comes; over and over again, he goes.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਿਣੁ ਗੁਰ ਦਾਤੇ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਨ ਭਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: vin gur daate mukat na bhaal |
lines.english: Do not seek liberation from anyone else, except the Guru, the Great Giver.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਮਛੁਲੀ ਫਾਥੀ ਜਮ ਜਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: jiau machhulee faathee jam jaal |
lines.english: Like a fish, he is caught in the noose of death.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਵ ਛੂਟੈ ਫਿਰਿ ਫਾਸ ਨ ਪਾਇ ॥੩੯॥
lines.translit: eiv chhoottai fir faas na paae |39|
lines.english: In this way you shall be saved, and you shall not fall into the trap again. ||39||

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਚੈ ਰਹੈ ਲਿਵ ਲਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: eik rang rachai rahai liv laae |
lines.english: Be absorbed in love for the One Lord, and remain lovingly focused on Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਬੁਲ ਕੈ ਘਰਿ ਬੇਟੜੀ ਬਾਲੀ ਬਾਲੈ ਨੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: baabul kai ghar bettarree baalee baalai nehi |
lines.english: In this world, her father's home, the daughter, the innocent soul bride, loves her Young Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੀਰਾ ਬੀਰਾ ਕਰਿ ਰਹੀ ਬੀਰ ਭਏ ਬੈਰਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: beeraa beeraa kar rahee beer bhe bairaae |
lines.english: She calls out, "Brother, O brother - stay, O brother!" But he becomes a stranger.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੀਰ ਚਲੇ ਘਰਿ ਆਪਣੈ ਬਹਿਣ ਬਿਰਹਿ ਜਲਿ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: beer chale ghar aapanai bahin bireh jal jaae |
lines.english: Her brother departs for his own home, and his sister burns with the pain of separation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਿਰਲੋ ਗਿਆਨੀ ਬੂਝਣਉ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸਾਚਿ ਮਿਲੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: biralo giaanee boojhnau satigur saach milee |
lines.english: How rare are the spiritually wise, who meet the True Guru, and truly understand.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਲੋੜਹਿ ਵਰੁ ਕਾਮਣੀ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਤੇਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: je lorreh var kaamanee satigur seveh tehi |
lines.english: If you long for your Husband Lord, O soul bride, then serve the True Guru with love.

lines.gurmukhi: ਠਾਕੁਰ ਹਾਥਿ ਵਡਾਈਆ ਜੈ ਭਾਵੈ ਤੈ ਦੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: tthaakur haath vaddaaeea jai bhaavai tai dee |
lines.english: All glorious greatness rests in the Lord and Master's Hands. He grants them, when He is pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬਾਣੀ ਬਿਰਲਉ ਬੀਚਾਰਸੀ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: baanee birlau beechaarasee je ko guramukh hoe |
lines.english: How rare are those who contemplate the Word of the Guru's Bani; they become Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਹ ਬਾਣੀ ਮਹਾ ਪੁਰਖ ਕੀ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਹੋਇ ॥੪੦॥
lines.translit: eih baanee mahaa purakh kee nij ghar vaasaa hoe |40|
lines.english: This is the Bani of the Supreme Being; through it, one dwells within the home of his inner being. ||40||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਨਿ ਭਨਿ ਘੜੀਐ ਘੜਿ ਘੜਿ ਭਜੈ ਢਾਹਿ ਉਸਾਰੈ ਉਸਰੇ ਢਾਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: bhan bhan gharreeai gharr gharr bhajai dtaeh usaarai usare dtaahai |
lines.english: Shattering and breaking apart, He creates and re-creates; creating, He shatters again. He builds up what He has demolished, and demolishes what He has built.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਰਮਿ ਭੁਲਾਨੇ ਭਏ ਦਿਵਾਨੇ ਵਿਣੁ ਭਾਗਾ ਕਿਆ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: bharam bhulaane bhe divaane vin bhaagaa kiaa paaeeai |
lines.english: Deluded by doubt, they have gone insane; without destiny, what do they obtain?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਰ ਭਰਿ ਸੋਖੈ ਭੀ ਭਰਿ ਪੋਖੈ ਸਮਰਥ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: sar bhar sokhai bhee bhar pokhai samarath veparavaahai |
lines.english: He dries up the pools which are full, and fills the dried tanks again. He is all-powerful and independent.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਡੋਰੀ ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਪਕੜੀ ਜਿਨ ਖਿੰਚੈ ਤਿਨ ਜਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh giaan ddoree prabh pakarree jin khinchai tin jaaeeai |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs know that God holds the string; wherever He pulls it, they must go.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇ ਸਦਾ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤੇ ਬਹੁੜਿ ਨ ਪਛੋਤਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: har gun gaae sadaa rang raate bahurr na pachhotaaeeai |
lines.english: Those who sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, are forever imbued with His Love; they never again feel regret.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਭੈ ਭਾਲਹਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬੂਝਹਿ ਤਾ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਈਐ ॥
lines.translit: bhabhai bhaaleh guramukh boojheh taa nij ghar vaasaa paaeeai |
lines.english: Bhabha: If someone seeks, and then becomes Gurmukh, then he comes to dwell in the home of his own heart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਭੈ ਭਉਜਲੁ ਮਾਰਗੁ ਵਿਖੜਾ ਆਸ ਨਿਰਾਸਾ ਤਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: bhabhai bhaujal maarag vikharraa aas niraasaa tareeai |
lines.english: Bhabha: The way of the terrifying world-ocean is treacherous. Remain free of hope, in the midst of hope, and you shall cross over.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਆਪੋ ਚੀਨੑੈ ਜੀਵਤਿਆ ਇਵ ਮਰੀਐ ॥੪੧॥
lines.translit: gur parasaadee aapo cheenai jeevatiaa iv mareeai |41|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one comes to understand himself; in this way, he remains dead while yet alive. ||41||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਇਆ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਰਿ ਮੁਏ ਮਾਇਆ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਸਾਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: maaeaa maaeaa kar mue maaeaa kisai na saath |
lines.english: Crying out for the wealth and riches of Maya, they die; but Maya does not go along with them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੰਸੁ ਚਲੈ ਉਠਿ ਡੁਮਣੋ ਮਾਇਆ ਭੂਲੀ ਆਥਿ ॥
lines.translit: hans chalai utth ddumano maaeaa bhoolee aath |
lines.english: The soul-swan arises and departs, sad and depressed, leaving its wealth behind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਮਹਿ ਮਨੁ ਉਲਟੋ ਮਰੈ ਜੇ ਗੁਣ ਹੋਵਹਿ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: man meh man ulatto marai je gun hoveh naal |
lines.english: The mind turns inward, and merges with mind, when it is with virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਝੂਠਾ ਜਮਿ ਜੋਹਿਆ ਅਵਗੁਣ ਚਲਹਿ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
lines.translit: man jhootthaa jam johiaa avagun chaleh naal |
lines.english: The false mind is hunted by the Messenger of Death; it carries its faults along when it goes.
